targets.query: from(bucket: "iot") |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "Alarm Event") |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "reason") |> map(fn: (r) => ({_time: r._time, "Event Type": r.status, "Reason": r._value})) |> group() |> sort(columns: ["_time"], desc: true) |> limit(n: 50)
